series_metadata.series_description: The Independent Living Older Blind Program (ILOB) serves individuals who are 55 years or older and who have a significant visual impairment with the goal to maintain their independence in a non-institutional setting. Record may include: Assessment; initial interview; case notes; Consent to Obtain and Release Information Form; Examinations/Referrals; Restoration; training; Individual Living Plan (ILP); Referral to Facility; Appointment Letter; Functional Limitations Worksheet; surveys; Certificate of Eligibility; authorization and billings; vendor invoices; documentation of SD/MSD; Application for Services; reviews; and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Case files are maintained in an active or closed status. Active case files are retained until the status changes to closed. Closed case files are maintained for ten (10) federal fiscal years after date of closure or as required for auditing purposes and then destroyed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: Case files are maintained in an active or closed status. Active case files are retained until the status changes to closed. Closed case files are maintained for ten (10) federal fiscal years after date of closure or as required for auditing purposes and then destroyed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
